name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual non-disclosure agreement created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers confidentiality obligations for both parties sharing sensitive information.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Used to capture the specific business terms (party names, effective date, governing law) that are incorporated by reference into the Mutual NDA Standard Terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers subscription terms, acceptable use, data handling, warranties, and liability for cloud-based services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for early-stage design partnerships between technology vendors and prospective customers. Governs feedback, intellectual property, and confidentiality during product development collaborations.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard service level agreement designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement. Defines uptime commitments, incident response obligations, and remedies for service availability failures.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for professional services engagements including consulting, implementation, and custom development work. Covers statements of work, deliverables, intellectual property ownership, and payment terms.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard agreement governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a controller. Addresses GDPR and other data protection law obligations including sub-processors, data transfers, and security measures.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software. Covers grant of license, restrictions, maintenance and support, intellectual property, and liability for software products.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for business partnerships between technology companies. Governs referral arrangements, co-selling, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and joint go-to-market activities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term contract allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal. Covers pilot scope, duration, fees (if any), data handling, and conditions for transitioning to a full commercial agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the relationship between a covered entity and a business associate that handles protected health information (PHI). Addresses permitted uses, safeguards, breach notification, and subcontractor obligations.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum governing the use of artificial intelligence features and capabilities within a software product or service. Addresses AI-specific provisions including data use for model training, output accuracy, and risk allocation.
